creator: gd@powernet.ru
text:
On Thu, 24 Oct 2013 15:20:02 GMT Christer Edwards wrote: > The following reply was made to PR ports/182496; it has been noted by GNATS. > > From: Christer Edwards > To: koobs@freebsd.org > Cc: mike@bayphoto.com, bug-followup@freebsd.org > Subject: Re: ports/182496: maintainer update: sysutils/py-salt > Date: Thu, 24 Oct 2013 09:16:52 -0600 > > --047d7bdca31cd93bdf04e97e200b > Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8 > > It is correct that 0.17.1 was recently released and we should jump directly > there. It includes a number of critical bug fixes. I've been busy at > $day_job and haven't had time to work on the port unfortunately. I'd be > happy to have some help with this release. You can close the request for > 0.17.0. > > > On Wed, Oct 23, 2013 at 9:00 PM, Kubilay Kocak wrote: > > > Thanks Mike, I can close on maintainers (or submitters) request > > > > --047d7bdca31cd93bdf04e97e200b > Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8 > Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable > >
It is correct that 0.17.1 was recently released and we sho= > uld jump directly there. It includes a number of critical bug fixes. I'= > ve been busy at $day_job and haven't had time to work on the port unfor= > tunately. I'd be happy to have some help with this release. You can clo= > se the request for 0.17.0.
> >


On Wed, Oct 2= > 3, 2013 at 9:00 PM, Kubilay Kocak < oobs.freebsd@gmail.com" target=3D"_blank">koobs.freebsd@gmail.com> span> wrote:

x #ccc solid;padding-left:1ex">Thanks Mike, I can close on maintainers (or = > submitters) request

> > --047d7bdca31cd93bdf04e97e200b-- > _______________________________________________ > freebsd-python@freebsd.org mailing list > http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-python > To unsubscribe, send any mail to "freebsd-python-unsubscribe@freebsd.org" Hi guys, Could you please check the patch attached. This patch for current port tree and bring update py-salt from 0.16.4 to 0.17.1 and staging support. Regards, -- Denis Generalov
